name: inline_array_pattern_in_values
description: String values containing [N]: patterns must be quoted by the encoder and survive round-trip. The encoder MUST quote these to prevent the decoder from parsing them as inline array headers.
expected:
GCF profile=generic
error="ERR[404]: Not Found"
speaker="[Speaker 1]: Hello"
array_like="[0]: looks like array"
timestamp="00:01:23,456"
url=http://example.com:8080/api
brackets_no_colon=value[0] ok
colon_no_brackets=key: value
